title: P!nk - Get The Party Started except "in my ass" is inserted after most verbs
description:
Some very stupid meme filler just to show I'M NOT DEAD (yes, pun intended for P!nk fans.) Had this idea today so I went for it.  This'll likely get blocked in all countries thanks to record labels, who knows... 👁️👅👁️
